narrative:
New Richmond Village A (precinct in Clermont County) has 753 registered voters, with 62.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.1 percentage points.
